Appearances:
Plaintiff Neil Doherty is present.
Attorney David MacPherson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kendall R. Brown is present.
Attorney Sarah Davis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MarkSchreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-16-2012 remains on calendar.
